title: OUAS Validation Response
description: Response format for the OUAS validation pipeline. Error messages are written for AI agents to read — specific, with exact field/component names and available alternatives. Never vague. (Rule 5.3.1)

valid.description: True if the config passed all validation checks.

errors.description: Array of validation errors. If non-empty, the config must not be applied.

warnings.description: Array of non-blocking warnings. Config may be applied but the agent should be aware of these.

migration_applied.description: True if the config was migrated from an older manifest_version.

migration_warnings.description: Details of components that were modified or removed during migration.

component.description: The component ID that caused the error, if applicable.

field.description: The field name that caused the error, if applicable.

region.description: The region ID that caused the error, if applicable.

message.description: Agent-readable error message. Must be specific, include the exact field/component, list alternatives, and never use vague language. (Rule 5.3.1)

suggestion.description: A suggested fix for the agent to try.

available_values.description: List of valid values the agent can use instead.

old_id.description: The old component/field ID that was migrated.

new_id.description: The new component/field ID, if renamed.

message.description: Human-readable description of the migration action.
